response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff-level individual contributor with deep expertise in distributed systems and a recent foray into AI-agent tooling. However, he lacks the executive engineering leadership, team-scaling track record, and specialized fintech domain expertise (credit risk, algorithmic capital allocation) required for this CTO position.
strengths: Strong backend engineering experience with high-throughput microservices and event-driven architectures.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Demonstrated architectural initiative as the founder and lead developer of an open-source platform.
concerns: Zero executive-level leadership experience or track record of scaling engineering organizations to 30+ people.
Lacks domain expertise in real-time credit risk, algorithmic trading, or working-capital allocation.
No evidence of managing outsourced engineering partners or establishing high-level corporate governance.
